messages.content: Hi there! Please rewrite this: AC and Heat operate effectively. Each room is controlled separately.
The AC and heating systems work efficiently and each room can be individually controlled.
Good working condition and lock properly
The equipment is in good working condition and locks securely.
rewrite more
The machinery is in excellent operational state and securely locks without any issues.
more
The systems are in optimal working condition, fully functional, and lock securely to ensure proper functionality and security.
more but shorter
The equipment is in great working order and locks reliably.
more
The equipment is functioning well and locks effectively.
Sufficient overhead lighting in all rooms
There is ample overhead lighting available in every room.
more
All rooms are adequately illuminated with ample overhead lighting.
Security gates and security monitoring system
There are security gates installed and a comprehensive monitoring system in place to ensure maximum security.
more and shorter
Security gates and a monitoring system are implemented for enhanced security.
Clean and scratch-free
The area is clean and free from any scratches.
more
The premises are spotless and devoid of any blemishes or scratches.
Secure location to keep owner private items
A secure location is available to safeguard the owner's personal belongings and maintain privacy.
paraphrase more
A protected area is provided to ensure the confidentiality and safekeeping of the owner's personal belongings.
switch the sentence structure
To maintain the privacy of the owner's personal items, a secure location is provided.
Strong network minimum 4 Bars (on mobile phone) with download speed min 5MPS throughout property
Throughout the entire property, there is a strong network signal with a minimum of four bars (on mobile phones) and a download speed of at least 5 Mbps.
All windows are cleaned and uncracked
The windows have been thoroughly cleaned and are free from any cracks.
switch the sentence structure
Free from cracks, all windows have been thoroughly cleaned.
The equipment is functioning well and locks effectively
Effectively locking, the equipment is in good working condition.
The equipment locks effectively and is in good working condition.
The AC and heating systems work efficiently and each room can be individually controlled.
Each room can be individually controlled, and the AC and heating systems operate efficiently.
Minimum queen-size bed with high-quality mattress
A high-quality mattress is provided on a minimum queen-size bed.
more
The property ensures a minimum queen-size bed equipped with a high-quality mattress for ultimate comfort.
more and shorter
Minimum queen-size bed with high-quality mattress included.
A high-quality mattress is provided on a minimum queen-size bed.
A minimum queen-size bed is furnished with a high-quality mattress.
switch the sentence structure and paraphrase
Provided on the minimum queen-size bed is a mattress of exceptional quality.
If space is allowing, additional bedding to be setup if client requests
Upon client request, additional bedding can be arranged if space permits.
Crib placement for families with babies in desired bedroom location
Families with babies can request the placement of a crib in their preferred bedroom location.
White linens in excellent condition at least 2 sets per bedroom thread-count over 500
In each bedroom, there are at least two sets of white linens with a thread count of over 500. They are maintained in excellent condition.
shorter and 1 sentence
Each bedroom is equipped with at least two sets of white linens with a thread count exceeding 500, all in excellent condition.
switch the sentence structure
In excellent condition, there are at least two sets of white linens with a thread count over 500 provided in each bedroom.
Hypoallergenic pillows min 4 per bed
A minimum of four hypoallergenic pillows are available on each bed.
Decorative pillow and other accessories
The beds are adorned with decorative pillows and other accessories.
shorter
Beds are embellished with decorative pillows and accessories.
shorter
Beds are accessorized with decorative pillows.
Side Lamps
Bedside lamps are provided.
TV with remote in each bedroom
In each bedroom, there is a TV with a remote control provided.
Zoned controller or portable sound system in every bedroom
In every bedroom, there is either a zoned controller or a portable sound system available.
shorter
Each bedroom is equipped with a zoned controller or portable sound system.
Ideally a safe in every bedroom. At least a safe in the master bedroom
Ideally, there is a safe in every bedroom, while at the very least, the master bedroom is equipped with a safe.
switch the sentence structure
At a minimum, the master bedroom includes a safe, while ideally, every bedroom is equipped with one.
High-quality drawers or built-in
The property features high-quality drawers or built-in storage options.
switch the sentence structure
High-quality drawers or built-in storage options are available in the property.
Regular or free standing wardrobe with at least 12 matching hangers
In each bedroom, there is a regular or free-standing wardrobe complete with a minimum of 12 matching hangers.
shorter
Each bedroom has a regular or free-standing wardrobe with a minimum of 12 matching hangers.
shorter
Bedrooms include wardrobes with at least 12 matching hangers.
Blackout shades or curtains
Blackout shades or curtains are provided in the bedrooms.
Blackout shades or curtains
The bedrooms are equipped with blackout shades or curtains.
Modern design, good working order and stain holders
The property features a modern design, is well-maintained and fully functional, and includes stain holders for added convenience.
Towel of the same color (preferred white) in excellent condition at least 4 per bathroom
In each bathroom, there are at least four towels in excellent condition, with a preference for white color.
Towel in excellent condition at least 1 per bathroom
Each bathroom is supplied with at least one towel in excellent condition.
Soap with liquid
Liquid soap is provided in each bathroom.
Make Sure all Shower Heads / Hand Wands Work Accordingly
It is ensured that all shower heads and hand wands are in proper working order.
Operational & Gets Hot. Remove any personal items left behind from the owner. Clean thoroughly.
The equipment is fully operational and heats up effectively. Any personal items left behind by the owner will be promptly removed, and thorough cleaning will be conducted.
Window covering provides privacy
The window coverings are designed to provide privacy.
Available in each bathroom
The items mentioned are available in each bathroom.
switch the sentence
Each bathroom is equipped with the mentioned items.
Functions properly completes full cycle
The equipment functions properly and completes a full cycle without any issues.
switch the sentence
Completing a full cycle, the equipment functions properly.
Functions properly and spotless
The equipment functions properly and is spotless.
more
The equipment operates flawlessly and is impeccably clean.
Heats to 500 degree, all burners work and spotless
Each burner functions effectively, heating up to 500 degrees, and is thoroughly clean.
Cabinets empty other than items for guest use
Except for items designated for guest use, the cabinets are empty.
High quality matching sets of butter knives, steak knives, forks, soup and small spoons minimum of 2 per max guests
There are high-quality matching sets of butter knives, steak knives, forks, soup spoons, and small spoons available, with a minimum of two sets per maximum number of guests.
switch the sentence
A minimum of two sets of high-quality matching butter knives, steak knives, forks, soup spoons, and small spoons are provided per maximum number of guests.
High-quality china in excellent condition (no cracks or stains) with matching set of dinner plates, side plates, bowls and tea cups with saucers, and coffee cups minimum 2 per max guest

In excellent condition, the property offers high-quality china sets with matching dinner plates, side plates, bowls, tea cups with saucers, and coffee cups. There are a minimum of two sets available per maximum number of guests, ensuring a delightful dining experience.
1 sentence

The property provides high-quality china in excellent condition, including matching sets of dinner plates, side plates, bowls, tea cups with saucers, and coffee cups, with a minimum of two sets per maximum guest count.
parphrase

Impeccably maintained, the property offers high-quality china in excellent condition, consisting of matching dinner plates, side plates, bowls, tea cups with saucers, and coffee cups. A minimum of two sets are available per guest limit.
1 sentence

The property offers well-maintained, high-quality china sets in impeccable condition, including matching dinner plates, side plates, bowls, tea cups with saucers, and coffee cups, with a minimum of two sets per maximum guest capacity.
switch the sentence

With a minimum of two sets per maximum guest capacity, the property provides high-quality china sets in impeccable condition, including matching dinner plates, side plates, bowls, tea cups with saucers, and coffee cups.
High-quality water, white wine, champagne glasses, and mugs minimum 2 per max guests
There are a minimum of two high-quality water glasses, white wine glasses, champagne glasses, and mugs available per maximum number of guests.
High-quality plastic water and wine minimum 2 per max guests
For the convenience of guests, the property offers a minimum of two high-quality plastic water and wine glasses per maximum number of guests.
Minimum set of cooking pans including saute pan, small pot and large pot. Basic spoons and set of cooking knives. Can opener. Serving platters and bowls.Paper Towel holder

The property provides a minimum set of cooking pans, including a sauté pan, small pot, and large pot, along with basic spoons and a set of cooking knives. Additionally, there is a can opener, serving platters and bowls, and a paper towel holder available.
Toasters & blenders
Toasters and blenders are available for guest use.

Coffee Makers
High quality / well-functioning machine coffee and espresso machine
The property provides high-quality, well-functioning coffee makers and espresso machines for guests to enjoy freshly brewed beverages.
Ice Bucket for Serving
An ice bucket is available for serving purposes.
Champagne Bucket for Welcome Ceremony
A champagne bucket is provided for the welcome ceremony.

As part of our commitment to consistent and exceptional service to our guests in your home, we will be verifying the
following items as part of our home inspection process:
As part of our dedication to ensuring consistent and exceptional service to our guests in your home, we will verify the following items during our home inspection process:
